rationale.D1: Confirmed zero *IO interfaces and zero device-named impls in src/main; hardware (NAR_CANSpark, NAR_TalonFX, Pigeon2) is used directly inside subsystems — motor abstraction exists only in the team's own 3128-common library layer, not as per-subsystem IO interfaces with sim variants, so this is command-based baseline (L1).
rationale.D2: Confirmed RobotManager extends FSMSubsystemBase<RobotStates> with a TransitionMap that registers commutative, coupled, converging, and diverging transitions; setStateCommand fans robot-wide goals out to all subsystems (Elevator, Manipulator, Intake, Climber, Swerve), with guarded kinematic delays (delayTransition, atElevatorDist) — this is a real centralized FSM coordinator (L3).
rationale.D3: simulationPeriodic is commented out in Robot.java; no ElevatorSim, DCMotorSim, SwerveDriveSim, maple-sim, or any physics simulation classes found anywhere in src — confirmed no simulation (L0).
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists in the repo (find returns nothing); CI workflow runs './gradlew build' only, not './gradlew test'; no @Test, assertEquals, or HAL harness found — confirmed no testing (L0).
rationale.D5: No AdvantageKit, DogLog, Epilogue, or URCL found; the team uses NAR_Shuffleboard (their own dashboard publishing in multiple subsystems) and common.utility.Log for typed logging, which is structured dashboard output but not a match for L2 structured lightweight logging frameworks — confirmed dashboard-level publishing (L1).
rationale.D6: Confirmed PathPlanner actively configured via AutoBuilder.configure with LocalADStar pathfinder, 40 path files, 5 auto files, multiple competition autos hardcoded; pathfindToPose exists in AutoPrograms but only as a helper method, not wired into main teleop flow; no Choreo files or repulsor — solid L2 with pathfinding infrastructure but not L3.
rationale.D7: Confirmed addVisionMeasurement wired through Camera.setResources callback in RobotContainer, two cameras with distance-based rejection thresholds (setThresholds), multi-camera AprilTag pose fusion with tag exclusion lists; no TimeInterpolatableBuffer, no dedicated RobotState class, no IO interface for vision — multi-cam fusion with filtering puts this solidly between L2 and L3.
rationale.D8: Confirmed 4 seasons tracked, CI on season repo, separate 3128-common and 3128-swerve library repos with jitpack.yml and maven-publish plugin (versioned artifact infrastructure), library consumed as project dependency (:libs:3128-common) not copy-paste; README in 2025 repo is minimal (2 lines) but library README is substantive — strong program-grade infrastructure (L4).
